name: Parcel — zone centroid lookup (for GIS auto-centre)

properties.sql: SELECT z.c_centroid_lat AS centroid_lat, z.c_centroid_lon AS centroid_lon, l.c_district AS district, l.c_agroecologicalzone AS agro_zone, l.c_parent_id AS parent_id FROM app_fd_parcellocation l LEFT JOIN app_fd_md_district_eco_zone z ON z.c_district = l.c_district AND z.c_agro_zone = l.c_agroecologicalzone
